title: Bodies of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US torpedo strike to be repatriated
summary_full: The seamen died when Iranian warship the Iris Dena was sunk on 4 March by a US submarine near Sri Lanka.
summary_public: The seamen died when Iranian warship the Iris Dena was sunk on 4 March by a US submarine near Sri Lanka.
